channel.title: Zoom on Evan Rowbotham
channel.description: Recent content in Zoom on Evan Rowbotham

item.title: Mathematics
item.description:
Since August 2022, I’ve been an applied mathematics & computer science undergraduate at FSU.

Work

  • International Competitor (Feb 2022). We were able to represent FSU at the McDonough Business Strategy Challenge, where we aimed to establish a streamlined operational framework to encourage collaboration between nonprofits, and measure client outcomes for Building Bridges.

Organizations

  • Securities Society – Pre-professional finance RSO focusing on career development and building valuable industry skills.
  • Seminole Innovators – A combination of innovative art, CS, and engineering students excited to create novel solutions and robust products.
  • Google Student Developer Club – Software engineering RSO that focuses on workshops presenting new design patterns & (soft) language introductions.

Academics

Choosing to major in applied math has been extremely rewarding, but at the time it never felt like an obvious choice. Here are some of my more detailed thoughts and decision parameters.

item.title: RL Trading Model
item.description:
Under Construction.

Over the summer I got work as a data science intern for a crypto hedge fund, Floating Point Group.
